==Biography==
Clark "'''ClakeyD'''" Smith enjoyed video games from a young age, playing Heroes of Newerth before he became interested in League of Legends upon seeing his younger brother play it. While Smith studied Business Economics at Pasadena community college for 2 years, he decided to pursue a career in pro-gaming before attending a university. He was originally the Jungler for [[Just Your Average Joes]] until he left the team in 2012, and his position was filled by [[OneBadBrad]]. He subbed for [[Epik Gamer]] at [[IGN Proleague Season 4 - Las Vegas|IPL4]]. After retiring from professional play, ClakeyD became an observer for the North American League Championship Series.

== Trivia ==
* Is the older brother of [[Nickwu]].
* Plays ''Super Street Fighter 4'', ''Street Fighter x Tekken'', and other fighting games at a competitive level.
** Is known as the victim of Hajime Tanguchi (Tokido)'s infamous "Murder Face" ceremony, which he performed when he beat ClakeyD's Ibuki with Akuma's Raging Demon in the ''SSF4'' tournament at SoCal Regionals 2010.<ref>[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LWY_6gwZipQ SoCal Regionals 2010 - MCZ Tokido (Akuma) vs. MRN ClakeyD (Ibuki)] YouTube (originally broadcast on UStream)</ref>
* Known for his {{ci|Jarvan IV}}.
